figures.caption: Figure 1. Overview of the proposed three-stage source-aware multi-expert framework for multi-source COVID-19 CT classification. Stage 1 builds a lung-aware 3D expert for volumetric classification. Stage 2 introduces two MedSigLIP-based 2D experts for slice-wise probability learning and inter-slice context modeling. Stage 3 performs source discrimination and source-specific expert inference, where source 0 is handled by the 3D expert and source 1/2/3 are jointly inferred by multiple experts through fusion and voting.
